title: Arcopola

{{Quote|Roi announced at the concert that he is beginning a new impromptu concert tour. His tour is scheduled to begin on Arcopola's sister world of Gambolla, so local fans will not have far to travel to catch his next concert.|Galactic Resorts news report by Tanda Marelle|<ref name="Journal11" />}}
'''Arcopola''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="Journal11" /> located in the [[Arcopola system/Legends|Arcopola system]] of the [[Spadja sector/Legends|Spadja sector]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the sister world of the terrestrial planet [[Gambolla]] and was the site of the location [[Greccia]].<ref name="Journal11" /> In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{JournalCite|11|Galaxywide NewsNets}} dates [[Fitz Roi]]'s [[Music/Legends|concert]] at Arcopola to the [[Standard week/Legends|week]] of the [[Great ReSynchronization calendar|date]] 37:8:14, which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> the famous [[Jatz/Legends|jatz]] [[Musician/Legends|musician]] [[Fitz Roi]] gave a rare Outer Rim [[Music/Legends|concert]] during the [[Arcopola Baas Music Festival]] at Arcopola. Later that [[Standard week/Legends|week]], on the [[Great ReSynchronization calendar|date]] 37:8:14, the [[Galactic Resorts]] [[Journalist/Legends|correspondent]] [[Tanda Marelle]] reported on the concert from Greccia.<ref name="Journal11" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arcopola was mentioned in the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature of the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|eleventh issue]] of [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'' magazine, which was published in [[November]] [[1996]]. The feature was authored by [[Paul Sudlow]].<ref name="Journal11" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Arcopola [[Star system/Legends|system]], and thereby Arcopola itself, in grid square Q-5.<ref name="TEA" />
